Enterprise Security Automation Platform

Automated Vulnerability
Remediation at Scale

AI-powered Security Orchestration, Automation, and Remediation (SOAR) platform that integrates vulnerability scanners, remediation engines, and automated deployment pipelines.

View DashboardDocumentation

Multi-Scanner Integration

Aggregate vulnerabilities from Trivy, Snyk, Checkov, Semgrep, and more

Automated Remediation

AI-powered code patching and infrastructure fixes with automated PRs

Compliance Engine

Continuous compliance monitoring for SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA

Real-time Monitoring

Live vulnerability detection and remediation progress tracking

Enterprise-Grade Architecture

Microservices

  • 20+ Independent Services
  • Event-Driven Architecture
  • Horizontal Scalability
  • Zero-Trust Security

Technology Stack

  • Next.js 15 + React 19
  • Python FastAPI + Go
  • Kubernetes + Istio
  • Kafka + PostgreSQL

Observability

  • OpenTelemetry Tracing
  • Prometheus Metrics
  • Grafana Dashboards
  • Loki Log Aggregation
